2127530.name: Heartstring
2127530.description:
Summary. QUICK!

A text-adventure game where you gain access to a host's mind in another universe to control them and interact with their world on their behalf. You will get to learn more about the life of the protagonist, Em, explore, form social bonds, defeat god, and do other RPG-like activities.

Hearts and Minds

As you make your way around the world, you will get thrown into certain people's personal lives by entering a world formed around their mind. The only way out is to reach its lowest point, where their deepest secrets lie and dangerous monsters live. Whether this breaks your bond with each other or not may be up to you.

Features

  • Fun dialogues between "chronically online" people 

  • Rock, paper, scissors, shoot! A turn-based microgame battle system where you throw hands in a pretty literal sense

  • Cats (they won't leave)

  • At least 1 ending

0_0
2127530.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
